components.buttons: Rounded-md. Play button uses pure white bg with black text for high contrast. Secondary buttons use glassmorphism.
components.cards: Refracted glass styling for hover states. Base state has border-transparent, hover gets border-white/20 and -translate-y-1 lift.
components.navigation: Sticky header, Crystal Glass (backdrop-blur-2xl bg-black/60), border-b border-white/10. Must have z-50.
components.admin_dashboard: Flat backgrounds (#0A0A0A), strict CSS grid, subtle 1px border (border-white/10), compact density (p-4).

media_and_images.description: Cinematic romantic couple for the main featured series banner
Modern dark living room to showcase cross-platform watching on landing page

testing.attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, cards) MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-play-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: You are writing standard JavaScript/JSX (.js/.jsx files), NOT TypeScript (.tsx). Adapt all component code accordingly.
Load 'Cabinet Grotesk' and 'Outfit' fonts from a CDN or Google Fonts in the index.html.
Hero section MUST use a gradient overlay for text readability: bg-gradient-to-r from-black/90 via-black/50 to-transparent. Never use a flat blanket overlay.

For series thumbnails in 'Browse' or 'Mi Lista' rows, implement 'Refracted Glass' on hover: the metadata (title, year, episodes) appears over the thumbnail with backdrop-blur-md and bg-black/60 overlay.
Admin dashboard must NOT use glassmorphism. Use flat solid dark backgrounds to ensure data clarity.
Limit the use of the primary accent color (#E07A8F) to CTAs, active states, and small indicators to maintain the Luxury (Archetype 5) cinematic feel. Do not over-saturate the UI.
Ensure 'Continue Watching' rows use a horizontal scrolling layout with gap-6, and hide scrollbars (scrollbar-hide).
Use Tailwind's aspect-video for standard episode thumbnails and aspect-[2/3] for series cover posters.
